creator: hg@pickle.south.mpcs.com
text:
The periodic run at 0200 local generated the following email.  If a
locateupdatedb ran it didn't sucessfully update its database.  Nothing
else is in this box's crontabs, neither the crontab -e nor the /etc/crontab

From: root@pickle.n2wx.mpcs.com (Cron Daemon)
To: root@pickle.n2wx.mpcs.com
Subject: Cron <root@pickle> /usr/libexec/atrun
Date: Wed, 27 Jan 1999 02:05:02 -0500 (EST)

CRON in malloc(): warning: pointer to wrong page.

How-To-Repeat: 
Haven't waited yet for another 0200 run ...
